zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Baguley III於1285年出生在英國爾巴可洛福 希爾時，他的父親William de Baguley II31歲，母親Lady Lucy de Corona43歲。他於1319年與Clemence Dutton在英國爾黑阿德爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1332年在英國英格蘭爾黑阿德爾享年47歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格亞特 曼徹斯特笛卡爾 特拉福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Baguley III于1285年出生在英国爾巴可洛福 希爾时，他的父亲William de Baguley II31岁，母亲Lady Lucy de Corona43岁。他于1319年与Clemence Dutton在英国爾黑阿德爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1332年在英国英格兰爾黑阿德爾享年47岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格亞特 曼徹斯特笛卡爾 特拉福德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Baguley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Baguley (Cheshire). The placename is from Old English bagga denoting an unidentified animal, perhaps the badger, + lēah ‘wood, clearing’. Compare Bagley .

variants.name: Bagley
meanings: English: habitational name from Baguley in Cheshire or from any of several places called Bagley, in Devon, Gloucestershire, Shropshire, Somerset, and Yorkshire. These get their names either from the Old English personal name Bacga + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ or from an unattested Old English word, bagga, for a ‘bag-shaped’ object or creature + lēah.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Baguley III was born in 1285, in Bucklow Hill, Cheshire, England, his father, William de Baguley II, was 31 and his mother, Lady Lucy de Corona, was 43. He married Clemence Dutton in 1319, in Cheadle, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1332, in Cheadle, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 47, and was buried in Old Trafford, Greater Manchester, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Old Trafford, Greater Manchester, Englan: Old Trafford, Greater Manchester, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Baguley III est né en 1285, à Bucklow Hill, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Baguley II, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lady Lucy de Corona, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Clemence Dutton en 1319, à Cheadle, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1332, à Cheadle, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Old Trafford, Greater Manchester, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Old Trafford, Greater Manchester, Englan: Old Trafford, Greater Manchester, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als William de Baguley III 1285 in Bucklow Hill, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Baguley II 31 und seine Mutter Lady Lucy de Corona 43. Er hat 1319 in Cheadle, Cheshire, England Clemence Dutton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1332 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Cheadle, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Old Trafford, Greater Manchester, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Clemence Dutton nel 1319, nel Cheadle, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1332, nel Cheadle, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Old Trafford, Greater Manchester, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Baguley IIIが1285年にイギリスチェシュアイアブックロウ ヒルで生まれた時，父William de Baguley IIは31歳，母Lady Lucy de Coronaは43歳であった。1319年にイギリスチェシュアイアチェアドルでClemence Duttonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1332年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェアドルで47歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグレアター マンチェスターオルド トラフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.Old Trafford, Greater Manchester, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 그리터 먼체스터 드 트래퍼드
ko.lifeSummary: William de Baguley III(이)가 1285년 영국 체실르 벅로 힐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Baguley II(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Lucy de Corona(은)는 43세였다. 그는 1319년 영국 체실르 체아들일에서 Clemence Dutton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1332년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체아들일에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그리터 먼체스터 드 트래퍼드에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Clemence Dutton em 1319, em Cheadle, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.Old Trafford, Greater Manchester, Englan: олд траффорд, гритир манчестир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Baguley III родился в 1285 г. в местности букклоу хилл, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Baguley II было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Lucy de Corona, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Clemence Dutton в 1319 г. в местности чидл, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1332 г. в местности чидл, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности олд траффорд, гритир манчестир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Clemence Dutton en 1319, en Cheadle, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1332, en Cheadle, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Old Trafford, Greater Manchester, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
